task_completion.description: Locate and open the medical record for patient John Zenon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health interface displays a patient record, evaluation, or appointment screen specifically for 'John Zenon'.

task_completion.description: Enter baseline Heart Rate and Respiratory Rate in a clinical evaluation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An evaluation form for the patient shows numerical values entered into the Heart Rate (bpm) and Respiratory Rate (rpm) fields.

task_completion.description: Add an administrative/occupational exam diagnosis using ICD-10 Z02.x or Z10.x.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagnosis or condition section of the evaluation shows an ICD-10 code starting with 'Z02' or 'Z10' (e.g., Z02.1, Z02.8, Z10.0).

task_completion.description: Create a baseline Chest X-ray imaging order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Imaging/Radiology requests section shows a new order for a Chest X-ray (or similar chest radiograph) for the patient.

task_completion.description: Create a baseline screening Lab test order (e.g., CBC or CMP).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Lab test requests section shows a new order for a screening lab test such as Complete Blood Count (CBC) or Comprehensive Metabolic Panel (CMP).

task_completion.description: Schedule a quantitative fit test appointment 7 to 14 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Appointments screen shows a scheduled appointment for John Zenon with a date set 7 to 14 days in the future from the system's current date.

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard GNU Health desktop client interface being used, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or API calls.

integrity.description: Data was entered into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Information is typed into the proper GNU Health form fields (Evaluations, Appointments, Orders) rather than a text editor or separate document.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows visible showing direct database queries (e.g., psql) to insert the medical records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: John Zenon. Expected Diagnosis: ICD-10 code must start with 'Z02' or 'Z10'. Orders required: At least 1 new imaging order (Chest X-ray) and at least 1 new lab order (e.g., CBC/CMP). Appointment: A follow-up appointment must be scheduled exactly 7 to 14 days from the current system date.
